emails.body: NDAs for Pan Handle Eastern Pipeline co Tana, Just a follow up. Did you happen to receive the above from Steve Hotte of ETS? If so, has a copy been forwarded to Pan Handle Eastern Pipeline co?

emails.subject: RE: NDAs for Pan Handle Eastern Pipeline co
emails.subject_base: NDAs for Pan Handle Eastern Pipeline co
emails.body: RE: NDAs for Pan Handle Eastern Pipeline co Thanks. Can you mail me when you get it? If I don't hear from you by end of week, I'll call Steve.

emails.subject: RE: NDAs for Pan Handle Eastern Pipeline co
emails.subject_base: NDAs for Pan Handle Eastern Pipeline co
emails.body: Sorry, it was on the slow boat, in interroffice mail back from Steve, I just got it. I'll fax a copy back to the company today and follow with an original by fedex this everning. Fred Philipson/ENRON@enronXgate 05/30/2001 10:38 AM
